pages.text:
REPUBLIC OF PALAU

fice of Minister of State

ANDRES UHERBELAU

Minister or state

Note. 044/MS/97

The Ministry of State of the Republic of Palau Presents its compliments to the French Ministry of Foreign Affairs and has the honor to announce that the Government of the Republic of Palau has decided to adhere to the Convention relating to international Exhibitions of 22

November 1928 and to the Protocols of 16 November 1966 and 30

November 1972 and to the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988.

The Ministry of State of the Republic of Palau avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the French Ministry of Foreign Affairs the assurances of its highest consideration.

CARTET

Koror, Republic of Palau

June 03, 1997

P.O. Box 100, Minister of State

Tel. (GiS) 48852309 • Kao(RepubicorPalau 96940
